ogTitle: Pink Lily vs Pinnacle: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pink Lily and Pinnacle.
heading: Pink Lily vs Pinnacle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pink Lily, Queensland and Pinnacle, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pink Lily has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Pinnacle (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pink Lily or Pinnacle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pink Lily has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Pinnacle scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pink Lily scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Pinnacle scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pink Lily or Pinnacle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pink Lily has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
